title: GNRI's COVID-19 Antigen Lateral Flow Test Device Use Steps
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"ak52j","text":"These guidelines illustrate the instrutions on how to use GNRI's COVID-19 Antigen Lateral Flow Test Device and the accompanying safety warnings.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"b1pjg","text":"Make sure you are in a safe place away from traffic and not operating any machinery. The test is undertaken in room temperature and preferably indoors. If the test is to be taken outdoors please ensure that there is no rain, strong wind or direct sunlight as these may affect the test results.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"d10pu","text":"- Please maintain the social distancing guidelines during all times even if the test results are negative.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4eujb","text":"- Please wash your hands thoroughly for at least 20 seconds before and after using the test.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Obtain a clean container (glass or cup) and produce a saliva sample in the container.
Remove a new COVID-19 Antigen Lateral Flow Test Device from its foil packaging.
Place the test strip in the container and leave for 10min.

Remove the test strip from the container and read results. Results interpretation: One Line (Control Line) = COVID-19 Negative Two Lines = COVID-19 Positive No Lines = Invalid Test. Please repeat test. One Line (Test Line) = Invalid Test. Please repeat test.
creator: Dr Georgios Gerardos
